title: EasyPlace Shulker Supply
description: EasyPlace Shulker Supply adds server-safe auto-withdraw for Litematica Easy Place, pulling needed blocks from marked shulkers at any distance with a GUI manager and multiplayer sharing.
body:
# Full Youtube ShowCase

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/J7ABbuhWmoM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# 🧰 EasyPlace Shulker Supply

Stop running back and forth for blocks. Build faster with Litematica.

ShulkerVerifier automatically supplies blocks from shulker boxes while you’re building with Litematica Easy Place.
If you don’t have the required block in your inventory, the mod pulls it straight from a marked shulker — instantly.

No manual refills. No distance limits.

## Incompability (Mods that dont work with EasyPlace Shulker Supply)
**- Item Swapper by Tr7zw**

# ✨ What This Mod Does
## 🧱 Automatic Block Supply

When Litematica Easy Place needs a block and you don’t have it, EasyPlace Shulker Supply pulls it from a marked shulker.

# 📦 Marked Shulkers/Chests

Mark shulkers/chests boxes to use them as material sources.

Marked shulkers/chests stay active until you manually clear them.

Marked shulker/chests have a custum texture so you can tell them appart
![This is what it looks like in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97d4de85ec4ce569af809a142b0143a9feae124b.png)

# 🌍 Unlimited Distance

Shulkers and chests work from anywhere.

As long as: 

- Another player is near the shulker or chest
  
OR

- A chunk loader is keeping it loaded
  
Perfect for huge builds and multiplayer servers.

# 👥 Multiplayer Sharing

Share your marked shulkers/chests with other players/friends.

Both players can place blocks and pull materials at the same time from the same shulkers boxes or chests.

Fully server-safe.

### Commands:

- /container share <player> (Share Marked Shulkers and chests with other players to build together)
- /container unshare <player> (Unshare Marked shulkers and chests with other players can be done in GUI too)
- /container clear (clears all shukers and chests from GUI)
- /container swapwhenfull true|false

### SwapWhenFull
- this feature allows the mod to move back a stack of block into a marked shulker or chest so you never have to go back and empty your inventory the feature is ON by default can be turned off with command (/container swapwhenfull true|false)

### Server

This mod must be installed in the server mods folder for it to work in servers

# 🖥️ Shulker and Chest Manager GUI

View all your marked shulkers in one place.
![GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca625c708b1bbc848543368e1a00154b4f41d599.png)

Inspect shulker contents remotely.
![Shulker UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/377ddee737db176ed1c83a088e467dcd433c2449.png)
![Double Chest UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/350fc79ff22958871e4b82852057a04f9db13747.png)
![Single Chest UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46e1cb90f7318a308690e8b0a0ce536dd103f917.png)
See who you are sharing shulkers with.

See who is sharing shulkers and chests with you.

Easy navigation with proper back buttons.

(ESC) can be uses as a universal back button for easy access 

# ⌨️ Clean Keybinds

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f57fbcf2393af3ea57dbba9f7ec081f29220b44_0.webp)

Default buttons can be changed in miscellaneous keybinds

Open GUI

- KeyPad 9

Turn ON/OFF shulker marking

- G

# 📌 Requirements

- Fabric
 
- Litematica

# 🏗️ Perfect For

Large schematic builds

Survival megabases

Multiplayer servers

Builders who hate inventory management

# BUGS
If you find any bugs feel free to join the Discord or leave a comment Reddit:
(https://discord.com/invite/MS7aSxZvZ6)
(https://www.reddit.com/r/ShulkerVerifier/)
